titleStmt.title: SII 34.72: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 72. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west and south walls of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Rājēndra I, 8th year, Tulā, Friday, 9, Śravaṇa = A.D. 1019, October 9, Friday.

The peruṅguṟi-perumakkaḷ of Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam met at the temple of Kayilāsamuḍaiyār in the village and decided to pay taxes themselves on some temple land. In case some persons transgressed this decision they were liable to pay each a sum of 100 poṉ individually to the king (chakravatti) towards the kaṟpūravilai. The first line contains the Sanskrit passage usually found on the seal of the king's copper plate grants. The writing has many errors.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī rājadrājan makuṭa śreṇi ratneṣu śāsanam Etandrājendracoḷasya parakesari varmaṇaḥ svastiśrī tirumaṉṉivaḷara Iru nila maṭantaiyum pOr ceyapāvaiyum cīttaṉic celviyum taṉ perun tEviyarāki yiṉpuṟa ṉeṭutu
yuḷ Iṭai tuṟaiṉāṭum tuṭarvaṉavēli paṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷi cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇaikkaṭakamum poru kaṭal Ī ḻattaraca tamuṭiyum Āṅkava tēviyar Ōṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pa
kkal teṉnavar vaitta cuntarar muṭiyum Intiraṉ ṉāramu teṉticai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatum Eṟipaṭai kēraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palapukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyu caṅkatirvēlai tolperu
ṅkāval palpaḻantīvum ceṟuvil ciṉavil Irupattorukāl Araicu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmar mēvalam cāntimaṟṟīvaraṉ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟirut taku muṭiyum māperum taṇṭa taṇṭa koṇṭa kōpparakēsari panma
rākiya śrīrājēndracōḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 8vatu v(ā)ṭakarai rājēndra siṅha vaḷaṉāṭṭu miṟaikkūṟṟattu brahmātēyam śrīkāmarāvalli caturvetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟip perumakkāḷḷōm Iyyāṭṭai
ttulā nāyaṟṟu veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum navamiyum peṟṟa tiruvōṇattiṉāṉṟu pakal Ivvūr śrīkayilāsamuṭaiyār tirumuṟṟattilē Iraṭṭaik kāḷāmūti m ceytu kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu Inta
kayilāsamuṭaiya mahādevarkku nāṅkaḷ rattukku tirāvatu I ṭaiyavaṟku ṉāl nilaṅkaḷum rō Iṟai ku maṇalūr nilattuḷ kāṇattu kaḷ pērāl karai
ppaṟittuppaṭṭa nilaṅkaḷum Idevarkē kuṭuttōm Iṉ nilam Idevar nilapēr pā kukku māṉanallūr kūṟupeṟa nilaṅkaḷḷum muṉpu Idevar paṅ vaḻivanta nilam ña nilaṅkaḷḷukku Oṉṟaṅ
llil pōnta Iṟaiyum Ūrpāṭu kuṭimaiy I śrīkayilāsamuṭaiya mahādevar nilam kaḷeppēṟpaṭṭaṉavum Iṟainīkkik kuṭuttōmākavum Ivaika vanta Iṟai Iv
vūr sabhaiyōm Iṟai Iṟukkakkaṭavōm Ākavum Ivvūr nilaṅkaḷiraṭṭil tiru� ṟata ḷḷiyān śrī kuntavai viṇṇākai tēvarkku nāṅkaḷ kuṭutta kaṭai tāl nivantu ṭṭatāl kācu 5 kācu Iraṭṭayu
nāratoṅkapērēri kīḻ kuḷḷāttil ṉilattukkum tanṉilattukku ṉillā viraṭi kum Iṟai kāṭṭ(ā)kaṭavōmāk(ā)vum Ipp(ā)riccāllātu Iṟaikāṭṭa paṇittāraiyum kāṭṭiṉṉārraiyum nammai Uṭai
yar cakravattikku kaṟpūravillaiyāka pērpoṉ nūṟṟu poṉ nimantappūvārākavum Ippāricup paṇittu sabhāniyōkam kuṭutōm śrīkāmarāvali catu rvetimaṅkalattu perukuṟiperumakkaḷḷōm Ippāricu pa
ṇittār cōḻarmahādevi cēri tirunallūr bhaṭṭaṉ māṟamāṟaṉum Amaṉ ni� tappa cērikāraṉ veṇṇayakatavittaṉmai kāmarāvalli cēri kācai śrīkṛ ṣṇaṉṉum rājakēsaricēri kaṇṭiyūr nakkaṉ vakkāṉṉum pa
ṇiyāl madhyastaṉ Araṅkaṉ mār collaiyāṉ Eḻunūṟṟu Aimpattu Aṟuvaṉēṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ittu pramāheśvara rakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 34.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
